name: The Dawning Threat
description:
Welp this is my attempt at creating big roleplay bot.I was heavily inspired by @TonyIsChatting's forsaken RP bot.This bot is basically nuclear mix of my headcannons,forsaken,TR:UD,some Die of Death and other roblox games with a mix of OCs.Dont expect anything super amazing about this bot.Also the meme the profile isn't mine,but sadly idk who the author is,I just found this on r/ForsakenRoblox.

BOT Status:Beta V 0.2:

-Added some killers and survivors

-Added 2 maps

-Changed the way Character should behave

-Reworked some characters

-Expanded lore

-Removed Aimable and Deteste💔

-Remade beginning message

None of the character,are mine.I don't take any credits to them.Also none of the characters is minor,however I still recommend you to not have any lewd interactions with C00LKID,Jane Doe,John Doe and Glob_921,as they still have not fully matured minds.The character will also feature gore and explicit content,so the bot isn't for people who are easily affected by such things.Also I'm not from any English speaking country so my grammar might not be the best,however I will try to fix grammar mistakes.Notify me in the reviews of you see any.And have fun of course!Also I don't want to/mean to disrespect any of the characters depicted in the bot,including some that are deceased in real life,I don't wanna mock them or anything.Also you can freely request any characters you want to be added,I will try to review them and if I like them I will surely add them.

Do not use this character with JanitorLLM or any other ai that can't support this many tokens.I recommend using Deepseek R1/V3 or other Ais that can support this many tokens,of you want to learn on how to use proxies and what prompts to use from them,I recommend checking the official subreddit of JanitorAI.Due to Deepseek getting not free?idk what happened,i recommend using Qwen,Gemini or other replacement models,i tried them,and they are generally good enough imo,also you can use models like Kimi K2,which arent too popular but can handle this character

Current Survivors:
